free_text: Investigation of the role of break-up processes on
the fusion of 16-O induced reactions
S.V.College, Aligarh
UGC-DAE Consortium for Scient.Res., Kolkata
The experiment was performed using
the 15UD-Pelletron Accelerator at the Inter-
University Accelerator Centre, New Delhi
Foils of spectroscopically pure 181Ta (99.99%)
with thickness of 1.5 mg/cm2. Three stacks, each of
four foils, three foils, and one foil, respectively,
were irradiated at energies of 100, 98, and
88 MeV to cover a wide energy range.
High Purity Germanium (HPGe) detector with
active volume of 100 cm3 coupled to a PC through CAMAC.
Total uncertainty
Compiled by S.H.
